title: Turkey sees its status in NATO rise, thanks to its weapons factories and Trump
summary_full: A friendship between presidents Donald Trump and Recep Tayyip Erdogan, and a need for weapons production, has changed how other NATO countries treat Turkey.
summary_public: A friendship between presidents Donald Trump and Recep Tayyip Erdogan, and a need for weapons production, has changed how other NATO countries treat Turkey.

TR.label: positive
TR.evidence: Turkey sees its status in NATO rise, thanks to its weapons factories
